Container.Name: slack-archive-archiver
Container.Overview: One-shot archiver CLI for the slack-archive project. Fetches new Slack messages and writes them to the bind-mounted data directory. Not a long-running service — triggered manually or via UnRAID User Scripts cron.

Config.Name: Data directory
Config.Description: Read-write bind mount where the archiver writes channel JSON, users, emoji, and search index.

Config.Name: Backups directory
Config.Description: Read-write bind mount where --snapshot runs create dated backups.

Config.Name: Config directory
Config.Description: Read-only bind mount containing the .token file with the Slack user token.

Config.Name: SLACK_TOKEN
Config.Description: Optional: Slack user token. If set, takes precedence over the .token file in the config directory.
